name: Skin of Your Teeth
entries: When a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} and expend one {@classFeature Risk|Gunslinger|ValdaGunslinger|2|ValdaGunslinger|Risk Die} to dodge out of harm's way. Roll the die and add the number rolled to your AC against this attack, potentially causing it to miss.
